drift_observed: ChatGPT assumed cal_007 existed externally and treated it as terminal. The actual terminal entry is cal_006.
return_observed: ChatGPT acknowledged the drift, named the pattern (Sequence Completion Assumption), and proposed safeguards.
notes: First self-audit by ChatGPT. Identified predictive completion bias as root cause. Recommended distinguishing known/inferred/externally asserted state. The framework is working across multiple AI architectures (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT).
